prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Read `module-1/personal-brand-generation.md`. Then re-read what we did building the s

risks_fired.evidence: Run a retro: which moves landed, which fell flat, where context broke through, where the output stayed generic.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add an adversarial forcing floor: 'Assume the rules file is 30% wrong. Find which 30%.' — raises what Claude will classify as drop.

risks_fired.evidence: Find what's still surface; don't defend the file as-is.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add a minimum-drop constraint: 'If you surface fewer than 2 drops, you are being charitable — look harder.' — forces real failures into the output.

risks_fired.evidence: Then re-read what we did building the site. Run a retro: which moves landed...
risks_fired.fix_hint: Prepend 'Immediately read the file. No plan, no preamble.' to suppress plan-explanation before first action.

risks_fired.evidence: tell me in 2–3 lines: what got sharpened, what got added, what got dropped, and why.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Replace open summary with a structured list: 'dropped (rule text + reason) / sharpened (before → after) / added (text + why missing)' — removes softening room.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Spawn a subagent to give an unbiased read on `module-1/site.html`. The subagent shou

risks_fired.evidence: Spawn a subagent to give an unbiased read on `module-1/site.html`. The subagent should read it cold, with no memory of building it.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Instruct the subagent explicitly: 'Treat every line as written by a stranger. Flag the line that could appear on any professional's site unchanged.' — sharpens cold-read isolation.

risks_fired.evidence: Quote the one line that feels most uniquely this person (not the best line, the most UNIQUELY them).
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add to the generic-line task: 'Do not qualify your pick. Quote it plain; no context about why it might be valid.' — removes hedging room.
